source_pr.title: ddl: stabilize test TestAddPrimaryKeyRollback1
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: wjhuang2016 <huangwenjun1997@gmail.com>

<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #21422 and close #17762 <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary:

If we delete the row "2038", then the error message would be "[kv:1062]Duplicate entry '2039' for key 'PRIMARY'". This may happen when the CPU resource is limited.

### What is changed and how it works?


Don't delete that row.



### Related changes

- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->


- No code

Side effects



### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note

symptoms: TestAddPrimaryKeyRollback1 intermittently fails because the expected duplicate-entry error message can vary (e.g. duplicate key '2038' vs '2039') under different timing/CPU conditions.
failure_signature: Duplicate entry error message is unstable: "[kv:1062]Duplicate entry '2038' for key 'PRIMARY'" vs "... '2039' ..."
root_cause_explanation: This test exercises DDL rollback under concurrent/random data changes. When a specific row (e.g. key 2038) is deleted during the randomized delete/insert loop, the duplicate key encountered first can change, leading to different (but equivalent) duplicate-entry error messages. Under constrained CPU/timing, this manifested as intermittent assertion mismatches on the exact duplicate key value. This PR stabilizes the test by skipping deletion of the specific row that would otherwise change which duplicate-entry error is observed first.
fix_pattern: Avoid deleting a specific row selected by the randomized delete loop (skip `n == defaultBatchSize*2-10`) so the duplicate-entry error message remains stable.

evidence: evidence: PR title: ddl: stabilize test TestAddPrimaryKeyRollback1
evidence: avoid deleting a specific row chosen by rand to keep error message stable (ddl/db_test.go)
